jobs.title: Gurugram University Recruitment 2026, Check Posts and How to Apply
jobs.age_relaxation_notes: age relaxation will be given as per the rules
how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or download it from the link below.
Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details.
Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.).
Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview.
Envelope: Also, attach a self-addressed envelope measuring 25 cm x 10 cm. If required in the notification.
The envelope containing the application should be superscribed “Application for the post of __________________________.”

The scanned copy (clearly legible) of the duly filled application form, along with self-attested copies of all annexures/documents, must be emailed to gugrecruitment@gurugramuniversity.ac.in on or before 13.07.2026. The hard copy of the application form, along with all supporting documents, should reach the Deputy Registrar (Estt.), Gurugram University, Gurugram, Mayfield Garden, Sector-51, Gurugram, Haryana-122003 latest by 17.07.2026.

faqs.question: What is the application fee, and how can it be paid?
faqs.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is ₹1000/-. For SC/ST/Female candidates, it is ₹250/-. The fee can be paid online via Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, or UPI.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for this?
faqs.answer: The last date to fill out the online form is 17-07-2026.

faqs.question: How do I apply for this recruitment?
faqs.answer: You will need to apply offline.

Sangini (Anganwadi Worker): Maximum Qualification: Graduation. Candidates with higher qualifications than Graduation will not be considered.
If no 10+2 pass candidate is available in the ward, a 10+2 pass candidate from a neighboring ward may be considered with the prior approval of the Mission Director of Mission Nutrition.
Selection will be based solely on merit, using the marks obtained in 10+2; no other criteria will be considered.
Sahayika (Anganwadi Assistant): If no Matriculation passed candidates are available in the Panch Ward, candidates with at least Class 8th qualification will be considered.
As per the applicable Human Resource Policy, the maximum qualification for the Sahayika post is a 10th class pass.

Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable).
Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking].
Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors.
After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.

Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details.
Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.).
Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview.
Envelope: Also, attach a self-addressed envelope measuring 25 cm x 10 cm. If required in the notification.
